---
title: "London Library, The"
---

## London Library, The

**Type:** organization

### About

This private circulating library was founded in 1841 and has been in  St. James’s Square since 1845. CMY joined in the early 1860s.  It still exists, though it does not have records of books borrowed by nineteenth-century members; see http://www.londonlibrary.co.uk/aboutus/history.htm

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
